search.folder_no_supported: No supported files found in selected folder

footer.confirm_delete_desc: Some tasks are running. Stop and clear all converting tasks?

video_advance.missing: format or encoder is not set
video_advance.colorSpaceHelp: Controls color space for output and compatibility. Use auto unless your workflow requires a specific standard.
video_advance.colorRangeHelp: Controls luminance range mapping. Full range is common for PC graphics, limited range is common for TV/video workflows.

audioCompressor.title: Compression Settings
audioCompressor.description: Only modifies compression parameters for the current task

fields.bitrateHelp: Controls audio data density. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.channelHelp: Controls output channel layout. Fewer channels usually reduce size, while more channels preserve richer spatial information.
fields.bitDepthHelp: Controls precision per sample. Higher bit depth helps preserve dynamic range and detail, but usually increases size.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: You can adjust format and encoder to achieve better compression

videoCompressor.title: Compression Settings
videoCompressor.description: Only modifies compression parameters for the current task

fields.bitrateHelp: Controls video data density. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.keyframeIntervalHelp: Controls keyframe interval. Smaller values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.colorDepthHelp: Controls color depth. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.aspectRatioHelp: Controls aspect ratio. Higher values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.encoderHelp: Encoder choice affects quality, speed, size, and compatibility. Choose based on format and usage needs.
fields.resolutionHelp: Resolution controls output dimensions. Higher values preserve detail but can increase file size and processing time.
fields.clarityHelp: Clarity controls the output quality. Higher values preserve detail but can increase file size and processing time.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: You can adjust format and encoder to achieve better compression

imageCompressor.title: Compression Settings
imageCompressor.description: Only modifies compression parameters for the current task

fields.ratioSummary: Compression ratio {{ratio}}% (higher usually keeps better quality and larger size)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure output settings for this task
settings.singleDescription: This change will be applied and converted only for this file.

fields.resolutionHelp: Resolution controls output dimensions. Higher values preserve detail but can increase file size and processing time.
fields.frameRateHelp: Controls how many frames are captured per second. Higher values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.bitrateHelp: Controls video data density. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.keyframeIntervalHelp: Controls keyframe interval. Smaller values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.colorDepthHelp: Controls color depth. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.aspectRatioHelp: Controls aspect ratio. Higher values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.encoderHelp: Encoder choice affects quality, speed, size, and compatibility. Choose based on format and usage needs.

fields.formatHelp: Output format affects available encoders, compatibility, and resulting size. Choose based on your scenario.
fields.encoderHelp: Encoder choice affects quality, speed, size, and compatibility. Choose based on format and usage needs.
fields.channelHelp: Controls output channel layout. Fewer channels usually reduce size, while more channels preserve richer spatial information.
fields.sampleRateHelp: Controls how many samples are captured per second. Higher values usually preserve more detail, but may increase size and processing cost.
fields.bitrateHelp: Controls audio data density. Higher values usually improve fidelity, but can increase size and processing overhead.
fields.bitDepthHelp: Controls precision per sample. Higher bit depth helps preserve dynamic range and detail, but usually increases size.

fields.resolutionHelp: Resolution controls output dimensions. Higher values preserve detail but can increase file size and processing time.
fields.encoderHelp: Encoder choice affects quality, speed, size, and compatibility. Choose based on format and usage needs.

fields.frameRateHelp: Lower FPS reduces file size and motion smoothness.
fields.colorsHelp: Fewer colors can significantly reduce GIF size.
fields.dpiHelp: DPI affects print/display metadata, not pixel dimensions.
fields.colorModeHelp: Choose output palette model for compatibility and quality.
fields.qualityHelp: Lower values reduce size but may introduce artifacts.
fields.preserveTransparencyHelp: Keeps transparent pixels in output when possible.
fields.preserveExtensionsHelp: Retains metadata/extensions if encoder supports them.
fields.sharpenHelp: Adds edge contrast; can improve clarity but may increase noise.
fields.denoiseHelp: Reduces visual noise before encoding for better compression.

remove_low.label: Remove Low Frequency
remove_low.desc: Suppresses low-frequency noise such as wind and electrical hum.

fft_denoise.label: FFT Denoise
fft_denoise.desc: Frequency-domain noise estimation, effective for continuous noise.

noise_gate.label: Noise Gate
noise_gate.desc: Attenuates silent segments to reduce residual background noise.

videoPreset.label: Preset
videoPreset.help: Controls encoder speed and compression tendency. Faster is usually quicker, slower may improve compression ratio.

dpi.label: DPI
dpi.help: DPI affects print density metadata and does not change pixel dimensions.

imageResolution.help: Common params: format, image_encoder, width, height, watermark. If either width or height is empty, scaling keeps aspect ratio.
